query:
SELECT section, COUNT(*) as notizie_oggi, MAX(createdAt) as ultima_inserita
FROM news_items 
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-03-22 00:00:00' AND section IN ('ai', 'music', 'news')
GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT section, COUNT(*) as notizie_oggi, MAX(createdAt) as ultima_inserita
FROM news_items 
WHERE section IN ('ai', 'music', 'news')
AND DATE(createdAt) = '2026-03-21'
GROUP BY section;
